name: Apple Juice
recipeIngredient: Good quality apple juice (blend of varieties)
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the juice for 24 to 48 hours.
2. Without mixing, carefully pour off the clear liquid and discard sediment.
3. Strain the clear liquid through a paper coffee filter or double layers of damp cheesecloth.
4. Heat quickly, stirring occasionally, until the juice begins to boil.
5. Fill sterile pint or quart jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace. Adjust lids and process.
6. For half-gallon jars: Fill into clean jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace. Adjust lids and process.
Recommended processing times for apple juice in a boiling-water canner:
- Style of Pack: Hot
- Jar Size: Pints or Quarts
- Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 5 minutes
- Process Time at Altitudes of 1,001 - 6,000 ft: 10 minutes
- Process Time at Altitudes of Above 6,000 ft: 15 minutes
- Style of Pack: Hot
- Jar Size: Half-Gallons
- Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 10 minutes
- Process Time at Altitudes of 1,001 - 6,000 ft: 15 minutes
- Process Time at Altitudes of Above 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
